title: mitracarpus parvulus
intro: Mitracarpus parvulus, also known as the firecracker plant, is a shrub-like plant native to tropical regions of Central and South America. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Mitracarpus parvulus include its potential to reduce fever and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections, such as coughs and colds. In herbal preparations, Mitracarpus parvulus is often dried and used in teas or infusions to harness its medicinal properties.
